content: But tbh honest i see her as a sub dps not a main dps

Yeah her kit is missing too many elements to work as a whole. Kinda like doresain. However doresain just underperforms sometimes.

She is just.... Not buildable.
She seems lacking on exploration
Guaranteeing crits is also a big problem.
lets see if she changes at all
reruns and events might also help

She could in theory be... A higher investment faint cheese character... Then the faint cheese team.

Doesn't allow you to run Goliath who may give a... Large amount of strength... For a flat 250 strike damage bonus...
Is she really that bad? i mean her numbers seems pretty high, i think you can push through exploration and one shot the boss tho

Again it will depend if all the damage adds up.

The issue is. You may just not crit and its over.
I mean i dont think about that, i fucking hate crits in rpg is just rng fiesta
But im gonna try clementine + tinct with her right away
With tinct its guaranteed

How do you deal damage in this game.

You're an another specimen who I need replays from. Hooleeee
damage bonuses son
Who needs crit when I can damage amp
they screenshot under pressure
Imagine playing morimens without the replay function
*I put my hands together* but what if... Damage amp and crit...
I honestly hate how they gave her crit on E1
If that wasnt the case you could just not use crits
didnt she get crit rate and crit dmg from death resistance?
You can build death res, death res once. And have a 90% crit rate.
No wait crit rate doesn't go up
Only damage
Womp
At E1
300 DR  -> 45 CR and CD
i guess its alright
but kinda hard to scale from that
I'm gonna see doresain esc screenshots, because of this.
God that's so correct
Just dont miss your crits easy we playing a gacha anyways may as well gamble
the doresain problem

Unlike doresain, she doesn't have any specific enemy based util.

Doresain crushes death res.
Since you get the 0 cost and can cycle that.
i cant tell whats her niche at this moment
I guess enemies with exactly 2 barrier. And Aoe for assassin arc 2 enemies.
She really outplays nothing. And adds... Almost nothing.
Doesnt she kinda crushes death res? with the 4x follow up
Except fun. Maybe.
If the follow up deals enough damage.
The issue is you won't often end a Dr enemy with a crit.

It's like what 40% atk damage with the weel at 3 dupes.

120% attack.
Per follow up
In my eyes her being kinda generic a okay thing, it would fell bad if she was necessary in some bosses due to the fact she is a collab unit
Not that i want her to suck
Yeah it's fair.

But she's in the middle ground where like...

I pull doresain out when I'm bored. Because his gimmicks are kinda fun to me. Or he counters specific enemies. Like the new fish.

Pulling her out... Even having a team/build for her that ticks every box. Is... Eh.
Again, I'll eat my words in 2 weeks
Isnt doresain 0 cost around 30% too?
Doresain gets his fuckton of strength tho
He self scales
Yeah she doesnt have all the scaling but her exalt gives flat dmg + str you will try to get who knows
Gonna scratch maybe lol
We'll see. It's gonna be a fun character to build either way.
My expectation is a B character right in the middle
Time to eat our words

At least it's not gmurphy "I play nuke card you die, look at Me, not fixing the stat distribution for the realm. Pull me if you have the idea to do tentacle damage based comps"

Boring ass damage dealer.
Intead of changing aequor they made a character do that, its like playing a tcg
Specially painful due to the A2 lemuria specific buffs
Well we see about mouchette gonna pull her either way because she looks fun
same
I would stalk the discord for a week to see if there's any gameplay I like. But I know that it just makes me complain like an old man and hate the game.
So I'm just gonna trial and guess, and check in here maybe.
